style.name: New Age Glam Fantasy
style.description: A retro-mystical visual style merging late-1970s to mid-1980s metaphysical paperback illustration, glam fantasy cinema, soft-focus beauty imagery, prismatic pastel-neon color, and analog media decay into visions of cosmic transcendence.
style.style_lock_line: Style: New Age Glam Fantasy — 1978–1986 metaphysical glam sci-fantasy, diffusion bloom/halation, prismatic pastels, VHS/CRT artifacts, analog film wear.
style.compressed_formula: symbol + glamour + glow + prism + artifact + transcendence

color_palette.shorthand: Lisa Frank rainbow glamour softened by mist, crystal refraction, satin reflection, and VHS bloom

temporal.description: Late 70s to mid 80s metaphysical glam visual world

lighting_modes.name: prism_scatter
lighting_modes.prompt: rainbow prism light scattering across the frame

lighting_modes.name: reflective_water
lighting_modes.prompt: reflective black water catching pink and violet glow

1.name: whispered_age
1.description: Slight bloom, minor chroma softness, faint CRT or print texture
1.prompt: slight bloom, faint CRT texture, subtle softness

2.name: clear_analog_memory
2.description: Visible VHS softness, moderate bloom, light scanline, color bleed
2.best_for: most default work, paperback covers, temple scenes
2.prompt: VHS softness, chroma bleed, light scanlines, moderate bloom

3.name: heavy_relic_mode
3.description: Obvious tape blur, strong bloom, visible scan texture, signal noise
3.best_for: explicit VHS references, lost broadcast aesthetics
3.prompt: heavy tape blur, strong bloom, visible scan texture, signal noise

format_cues: composed like a lost metaphysical paperback cover
framed as an 80s fantasy film still

negative_prompts.core: cyberpunk, urban neon, city streets, dark occult, demonic, horror, blood, gore, medieval armor, swords, battle, hyperrealistic, ultra sharp, clean CGI, modern editorial, vaporwave irony, datamosh, harsh shadows, primary red, earthy brown, industrial, dystopian

prompt_examples.short: A cosmic priestess in a mirrored crystal temple above reflective black water, glowing mushrooms and crystal clusters, halo backlight through mist, soft diffusion bloom, hot pink violet aqua palette, subtle VHS softness, composed as a lost metaphysical paperback cover. Style: New Age Glam Fantasy — 1978–1986 metaphysical glam sci-fantasy, diffusion bloom/halation, prismatic pastels, VHS/CRT artifacts, analog film wear.
prompt_examples.medium: A radiant oracle with long wild pink curly hair standing in a mirrored crystal temple above reflective black water, surrounded by glowing mushrooms and crystal clusters and drifting prism flares, wearing an orchid satin gown with silver jewelry and chiffon veils, lit by halo backlight through lavender and teal haze, soft-focus glam optics with prismatic lens flare, hot pink violet aqua lemon and pearl palette, faint CRT texture and chroma bleed, evoking sacred glamour and cosmic initiation, composed as a lost metaphysical paperback cover. Style: New Age Glam Fantasy — 1978–1986 metaphysical glam sci-fantasy, diffusion bloom/halation, prismatic pastels, VHS/CRT artifacts, analog film wear.
prompt_examples.long: A luminous oracle with long wild pink curly hair stands barefoot on a ceremonial mirrored platform above reflective black water inside a vast crystal moon temple, surrounded by giant quartz clusters, pastel glowing mushrooms, velvet moss, floating jewel-toned butterflies, and soft fractal aura patterns radiating behind her, wearing a flowing hot pink and orchid satin gown with silver lamé trim, chiffon veils, crystal rings, satin gloves, glossy lips, frosted lavender eyeshadow, and a jeweled moon-crown headpiece, lit by radiant halo backlight and candy-colored prism spill in teal, aqua, violet, and lemon glow, rendered with heavy diffusion bloom, dreamy halation, mist-filled air, and pearlescent highlight rolloff, in a Lisa Frank–adjacent high-chroma cosmic palette of bubblegum pink, magenta, orchid, turquoise, mint, lemon, pearl white, and silver, with subtle VHS softness, chroma bleed, faded print wear, and faint CRT scanline texture, evoking sacred beauty, visionary longing, and glamorous spiritual initiation, composed as a center-framed lost metaphysical paperback cover from an obscure 1983 fantasy media universe. Style: New Age Glam Fantasy — 1978–1986 metaphysical glam sci-fantasy, diffusion bloom/halation, prismatic pastels, VHS/CRT artifacts, analog film wear.
